parameters.query: INSERT INTO bookings (booking_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, services, subtotal_cents, tax_cents, total_cents, pickup_time, special_instructions, source, status, created_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.booking_id }}', '{{ $json.customer.name }}', '{{ $json.customer.email }}', '{{ $json.customer.phone }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.services) }}', {{ $json.subtotal_cents }}, {{ $json.tax_cents }}, {{ $json.total_cents }}, '{{ $json.pickup_time }}', '{{ $json.special_instructions }}', '{{ $json.source }}', 'pending', NOW());
